facebook.caption:
5.0 stars. 289 reviews. Zero complaints.

ALOHA88 - Kayak & Snorkeling club in Phu Quoc is hitting a perfect score and the review count is only going up. Paddle out, drop your face in the water, and see what everyone is raving about.

If you're spending even one day near the water in Phu Quoc, this one belongs on the list.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
